title: Power BI KPI Dashboard
short_summary: Role-based multi-page Power BI dashboard with RLS, a DAX measure library, and interactive filtering
summary: A multi-page Power BI dashboard demonstrating role-based KPI visualization with Row-Level Security, a complete DAX measure library, and interactive bookmark navigation. Structured around a Teacher/Staff view and an Admin view, with metrics covering grade distribution, subject performance, behavior incidents, and assignment completion. Serves as the portfolio foundation for SteadMark Metrics, a K-12 analytics product.

components.name: Operational Staff View
components.objective: Build a teacher and front-line staff dashboard page with performance overview, grade distribution, subject breakdowns, behavior heatmap, and assignment completion metrics.
components.business_value: Gives teachers and staff real-time visibility into classroom performance to support timely intervention and instructional adjustment.

components.name: Admin View
components.objective: Build an administrator dashboard page with aggregated performance comparisons and leadership-level KPIs, secured by Row-Level Security.
components.business_value: Enables school administrators to monitor institutional performance trends and identify areas requiring resource allocation or policy adjustment.
